steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: libultra osEPiRawReadIo (epirawread.c). Broke the '<80% MMIO-reloc cap' with the same constant-MMIO-vs-extern lever. TU-defined 2-byte struct (PgsRls D_8001B656 = {0}) for a single shared-$at pair — the precision version of the TU-defined-global lever (full struct over-batches).
